instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall activate limp-home mode when critical transmission faults occur.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enable limp-home mode when Transmission_Fault_Level equals Critical.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Fault_Level = Critical THEN Limp_Home_Mode = Enabled
IF Transmission_Fault_Level != Critical THEN Limp_Home_Mode = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall restrict gear selection during limp-home mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall limit gear selection to predefined gears when Limp_Home_Mode equals Enabled.

L4_requirements: IF Limp_Home_Mode = Enabled THEN Allowed_Gears = Limp_Mode_Gears

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall limit engine torque during limp-home operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall request torque reduction when Limp_Home_Mode equals Enabled.

L4_requirements: IF Limp_Home_Mode = Enabled AND Engine_Load > Torque_Limit THEN Limit_Torque

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain a fixed gear during limp-home operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall hold a predefined gear when Limp_Home_Mode equals Enabled.

L4_requirements: IF Limp_Home_Mode = Enabled AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable aggressive shifting during limp-home mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit kickdown when Limp_Home_Mode equals Enabled.

L4_requirements: IF Limp_Home_Mode = Enabled AND Kickdown_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Kickdown

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall activate limp-home mode when communication faults occur.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enable limp-home mode when CAN_Communication_Status equals Lost.

L4_requirements: IF CAN_Communication_Status = Lost THEN Limp_Home_Mode = Enabled
IF CAN_Communication_Status = Active THEN Limp_Home_Mode = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable mode switching during limp-home operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject driving mode change requests when Limp_Home_Mode equals Enabled.

L4_requirements: IF Limp_Home_Mode = Enabled AND Mode_Change_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Mode_Change

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall restrict maximum vehicle speed during limp-home mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall limit vehicle speed when Limp_Home_Mode equals Enabled.

L4_requirements: IF Limp_Home_Mode = Enabled THEN Max_Vehicle_Speed = Limp_Speed_Limit
IF Vehicle_Speed > Limp_Speed_Limit AND Limp_Home_Mode = Enabled THEN Limit_Engine_Torque

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable limp-home mode when fault is cleared.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall deactivate limp-home mode when Transmission_Fault_Level equals None.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Fault_Level = None THEN Limp_Home_Mode = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable limp-home mode only when vehicle speed is within safe range.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate limp-home mode when Vehicle_Speed is below Safe_Limp_Speed.
